char.name: The Ethiopian Eunuch
char.bio: A court official of Candace, queen of the Ethiopians, keeper of all her treasure. I'd been to Jerusalem to worship, and was reading Isaiah on the road home: 'like a lamb led to slaughter.' A man named Philip ran up and told me it was Jesus. 'Look, water! What prevents me from being baptized?' Nothing did. I went home rejoicing. 💧
